_publications._publicationTitle: PERADIGM: Phenotype embedding similarity-based rare disease gene mapping.

_contextSnippet: we utilize individual-level ICD-10 codes from EHR data to create embedding representations for each phenotype using a continuous bag-of-words (CBOW) Word2Vec model
details: Successfully created embedding representations for phenotypes using continuous bag-of-words (CBOW) model from individual-level ICD-10 codes
